overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through the historic streets of Saint Denis, transitioning from a narrow cobblestone street past the Jade Dragon Restaurant into an open market area, and stopping to let a tram pass. The scene features detailed 1890s architecture, horse-drawn carriages, and period-appropriate street elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone sidewalk with iron fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone sidewalk next to a wrought iron fence, passing historic brick buildings

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking in the opposite direction along the fence

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence running along the sidewalk edge
multi-story brick building with white-framed windows and red awnings
large red sign with white text spanning across the street ahead
ornate black iron street lamp on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone street bordered by an iron fence on the left and historic brick buildings on the right. The Jade Dragon Restaurant sign is visible ahead in the distance, and pedestrians occasionally pass by in the opposite direction.

events.description: street widens as character passes underneath the Jade Dragon Restaurant sign

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as it opens up into a wider thoroughfare

notable_agents.action: man in suspenders and cap walking past the character

entered.detail: large green industrial building with red roof visible at the end of the street
network of electrical wires crossing between buildings overhead
wooden wagon cart parked on the side of the street

segments.scene_description: The street widens as the character passes under the Jade Dragon Restaurant sign. The view opens up to reveal a large green market building ahead, with overhead utility wires crisscrossing between the historic buildings. The cobblestone street continues toward the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market plaza with tram tracks

events.description: enters the open market area with large green building and visible tram tracks

agents.ego_description: walking through the open market square toward the green building, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street ahead

entered.detail: metal tram rails embedded in the dirt road surface
stack of wooden barrels and crates outside the green building
industrial smokestack emitting smoke visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open market plaza with tram tracks running through the center. The large green market building dominates the left side, while horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians move through the area. Industrial elements like a distant smokestack become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: tram line crossing in industrial district

events.description: character stops at tram tracks to wait for approaching streetcar
green tram passes from right to left in front of the character
character resumes walking after the tram passes

agents.ego_description: pausing at the tram tracks to wait for the streetcar to pass before continuing

notable_agents.action: green tram moving from right to left across the character's path
man leaning against utility pole watching the tram pass

entered.detail: wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the tram tracks to let a green streetcar pass from right to left. After the tram clears, the character continues walking down the dirt road lined with utility poles, moving deeper into the industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the historic streets of Saint Denis, transitioning from a narrow urban corridor into a wide, industrial market plaza. It begins with the character walking along a narrow cobblestone street bordered by an iron fence and brick buildings, moving steadily toward the Jade Dragon Restaurant sign. As the character passes under the sign, the street widens and the view opens up to reveal a large green market building and a network of overhead utility wires. The scene then expands into a bustling market plaza where horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians navigate around central tram tracks and distant industrial smokestacks. Finally, the character pauses to let a green streetcar pass from right to left before continuing down a dirt road lined with utility poles toward the industrial district.
